payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_a060f56a8bad4ad2aed48e43', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\\n\\"\\"\\"Calculate total revenue from sales CSV data.\\"\\"\\"\\nimport csv\\nimport sys\\n\\n\\ndef calculate_total_revenue(csv_file):\\n    \\"\\"\\"Read CSV and calculate total revenue (Price * Quantity sum).\\"\\"\\"\\n    total = 0.0\\n    with open(csv_file, \'r\') as f:\\n        reader = csv.DictReader(f)\\n        for row in reader:\\n            price = float(row[\'Price\'])\\n            quantity = int(row[\'Quantity\'])\\n            total += price * quantity\\n    return total\\n\\n\\nif __name__ == \'__main__\':\\n    file_path = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else \'sales_data.csv\'\\n    revenue = calculate_total_revenue(file_path)\\n    print(f\\"Total Revenue: {revenue:.2f}\\")", "filename": "analyzer.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
